mapper.insert: insert into ai_chat_session ( user_id, title, last_message_time, create_time, update_time ) values ( #{userId}, #{title}, #{lastMessageTime}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime} )
mapper.select: select id, user_id as userId, title, last_message_time as lastMessageTime, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime, is_deleted as isDeleted from ai_chat_session where id = #{id} and user_id = #{userId} and is_deleted = 0 limit 1

select s.id, s.title, s.last_message_time as lastMessageTime, s.create_time as createTime, ( select count(1) from ai_chat_message m where m.session_id = s.id and m.is_deleted = 0 ) as messageCount from ai_chat_session s where s.user_id = #{userId} and s.is_deleted = 0 order by s.last_message_time desc, s.id desc
mapper.update: update ai_chat_session set title = #{title}, last_message_time = #{lastMessageTime}, update_time = #{updateTime} where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
